result.stdout:
Description:
  Sample app for System.CommandLine

Usage:
  Localizer.Cli [options]

Options:
  --localizeDisplayInfo <localizeDisplayInfo>  Display info to localize.
  --file <file>                                The file to read and display on the console.
  --apikey <apikey>                            The api key for Azure Translator
  --region <region>                            The api rgion for Azure Translator
  --from <from>                                From language code
  --to <to>                                    To language code
  --version                                    Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                               Show help and usage information
